message:
core: implement bd-1hi.6 RaptorQ source block partitioning (§3.1)

Add RFC 6330 §4.4.1 source block partitioning for databases larger than
a single RaptorQ source block (K_max = 56,403 symbols). Implements
balanced partitioning into Z_L larger and Z_S smaller blocks with at
most 1-page size difference. Handles edge cases including empty DB,
single page, exact K_max boundary, and SBN overflow detection.

19 passing tests covering spec worked example (1GB/262K pages → 5 blocks),
property tests for coverage/determinism/contiguity/K_max bounds, and
compliance gates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
